calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change for a minor.

Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Petitioner Marilu Gonzalez, mother of minor Anaia Sophia Brown sworn and examined.

Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are
true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Anaia Sophia Brown to Anaia Sophia Gonzalez.

Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
